aframThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 19:11:13 UTC.12/07/2018

English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Darryl Ricardo Matthews Sr. Papers
Matthews, Darryl R.
8542
10 cubic feet. 10 cubic feet.
ca. 1990-2009. Papers include Alpha Phi Alpha and National Association of Black Accountants material. Collection material in English 9418959
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
November 2017
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, November 2017
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, November 2018
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Darryl R. Matthews, Sr., graduated from the University of Central Missouri (1975-1977) with a degree in Sociology/Political Science. He was the Executive Director ∓ Chief Operating Officer of the National Association of Black Accountants (NABA) from March 1998 - March 2007, the 32nd General President of Alpha Phi Alpha Fraternity from January 2005 - December 2008, the Executive Director of the National Medical Association (NMA) from October 2011 - January 2014, and the Executive Director of the NABA from January 2014 - October 2015.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Papers include Alpha Phi Alpha and National Association of Black Accountants material.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Alpha Phi Alpha
Series II. National Association of Black Accountants
Cite As:
Darryl Ricardo Matthews Sr. Papers, #8542. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:
Access to Box 6, folder 60 restricted until 2067 or to the permission of the University Archivist.
National Association of Black Accountants. Alpha Phi Alpha Fraternity.
